general.title: General
general.restoreWorkspaceDesc: Automatically open the last active workspace when the app starts
general.launchAtLoginDesc: Start Octopal automatically when you log in

language.title: Language
language.desc: Choose the display language for the app

agents.title: Default Agent Permissions
agents.desc: New agents will start with these permissions. You can override per-agent in the agent settings.
agents.fileWriteDesc: Allow agents to create and edit files
agents.shellDesc: Allow agents to execute bash/shell commands
agents.networkDesc: Allow agents to make web requests

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeComingSoon: Light and System themes coming soon

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.textExpansionsDesc: Define shortcuts that expand when you send a message. Type the trigger (e.g. /fix) and it auto-expands. Saves tokens and speeds up your workflow.
shortcuts.noShortcuts: No shortcuts yet. Add one to speed up your workflow!
shortcuts.triggerMinLength: Trigger must be at least 2 characters
shortcuts.suggestionsDesc: Quick-add common shortcuts based on your agents:

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.observerModelDesc: The AI model used for conversation state tracking and message routing. Haiku is fast and cheap, Sonnet is more accurate.
advanced.autoModelSelectionDesc: Automatically choose the optimal AI model based on task complexity. When off, all agents use the default model.
advanced.defaultAgentModelDesc: Fixed model for all agent responses when adaptive selection is disabled.
advanced.metricsDesc: Real-time quality metrics for the SmartObserver LLM calls.

chat.placeholder: Message the room… (@name to target one agent, @all for everyone)
chat.placeholderDisabled: Open a folder to start chatting
chat.emptyWithFolder: Use @name to talk to an agent. @all to talk to everyone.
chat.emptyNoFolder: Open a folder to get started.
chat.routing: Routing message to the right agent…

agents.title: Agents
agents.clickToMention: Click to mention, right-click to edit
agents.limitMsg:
You can create up to {{max}} agents per folder.
Delete an existing agent and try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Octopal!
welcome.desc:
Start by opening a project folder
to chat with your AI teammates.

createAgent.title: New agent
createAgent.permissionsHint: Without any of these, the agent can only reply with text. Turn one on to let it act.

editAgent.title: Edit agent
editAgent.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? This removes the .octo file permanently.

createWorkspace.title: New workspace
createWorkspace.hint: Start by creating a workspace. You can have multiple workspaces for different contexts — work, side projects, experiments.

openFolder.desc: Open a project folder to get started.

claudeLogin.descNotInstalled: Octopal requires the Claude CLI to communicate with agents. Please install it first:
claudeLogin.descNotLoggedIn: You need to log in to Claude CLI before using Octopal. Open a terminal and run:
claudeLogin.hint: After logging in, restart Octopal or dismiss this dialog.
claudeLogin.retryFailed: Claude CLI still not found. Please install and log in, then try again.

wiki.title: Wiki
wiki.emptyDesc:
Shared notes the whole team can read and write.
Create a page to get started.

app.windowLimit: You can open up to {{max}} windows.
app.removeWorkspaceConfirm: Remove this workspace? Folders inside remain on disk.
app.waiting: Waiting — {{name}} is still working on a previous message…
app.bundleModify: ⏸️ @{{agent}} Stopping current task to deliver updated instructions.
app.permRetryPrompt:
(Previously couldn't perform task due to lack of permissions. User approved permissions. Please continue with the original request.)

User's original request: {{request}}

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.hint: Connect external tools (Figma, GitHub, Slack, etc.) via Model Context Protocol. Paste a JSON config or leave empty.
mcp.jsonError: Invalid JSON. Please check the format.

mcpValidation.title: MCP Server Validation
mcpValidation.authError: {{server}} token has expired or is invalid
mcpValidation.authErrorHint: Go to agent settings and enter a new token. (e.g., Figma > Settings > Personal Access Tokens)
mcpValidation.networkErrorHint: Check your internet connection and try again. A firewall or proxy may be blocking the connection.
mcpValidation.installFailedHint: Try installing manually in the terminal, or check your network connection.
mcpValidation.serverConnected: {{server}} MCP server is connected and ready!
mcpValidation.allConnected: All MCP servers are connected and ready!
mcpValidation.hasIssues: The server has issues. The agent will still work, but without MCP tools.
mcpValidation.tokenExpiryMessage: Agent "{{agent}}"'s {{server}} token has expired or is invalid. Please enter a new token in settings.

security.accessRequestDesc: Agent "{{agent}}" is trying to access a file outside the project.
security.blockedDesc: This path is restricted by the security policy.
